_comment: Shamir reference vectors for rrn-identity. Generated by generate_shamir_vectors.py against Trezor shamir-mnemonic 0.3.0 (the SLIP-0039 reference). Field: GF(256), Rijndael 0x11B, generator x+1. cross_impl = explicit-coefficient split certified against _interpolate; slip0039 = reference SLIP-0039 split, reconstructed at x=0 by re-indexing member shares ^255.
